positive: A minimalist, whimsical depiction of a glowing hot air balloon floating over a stylized, abstract mountain range at dawn. The balloon has geometric patterns and is filled with bioluminescent, stylized floral elements. The scene uses a restricted color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, sage green, and luminous gold. Composition must feature a strong central silhouette of the balloon against a crisp gradient sky. Style is a blend of modern vector art and Art Nouveau illustration, with clean linework and solid color blocks. High contrast, deep saturation, perfect for apparel printing, centered, no photorealism.
